chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4345 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 19.1.2026 Mr. Mehboob Ashraf advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Riaz advocate for the petitioner Mr. Asad Ahmed advocate for the respondent / KMC --------------------- The petitioner has approached this Court for releasing of the pensionary benefits with directions to respondent No.2 to release gratuity funds, benevolent funds, group insurance and other back benefits as well as monthly pension. Learned counsel for the respondent / KMC seeks time to release the pensionary benefits of the petitioner within four weeks. In view of the above, the instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
